non_blocking_issues: ChatSessionTabStrip.kt:247 — fit-mode integer division (contentWidth / size) truncates fractional Dp, may leave up to (size-1)dp gap at right edge in Arrangement.Start; cosmetic only, not a regression.

ChatSessionTabStrip.kt:193 — lastRootIndex initialised to 0 cannot distinguish 'unset' from 'tab 0 explicitly selected'; first load into a sub-agent (deep-link) may scroll to tab 0 while highlighting a parent; resolves on next root-tab tap; low impact.
ChatSessionTabStrip.kt:204-277 — BoxWithConstraints overflow/fit-mode width math has no unit test (only on-device/manual); acceptable given no-UI-test-in-CI constraint.

OpenCodeApi.kt:309-310 — hintsAsStringList silently drops non-primitive JSON elements via (it as? JsonPrimitive)?.content; intentional tolerant parsing, only matters if server emits structured hint entries.
notes: Release bundles three independently-developed, disjoint change sets, all merged to main with check.sh green (600+ unit tests). ② directory query rewrite correctly mirrors GET/HEAD only, never overwrites caller query, adds location[directory] for /api/ paths, aligned with upstream sdk/js rewrite() — 10 MockWebServer tests cover all modes. ③ ServerCompatProfile semver parse is tolerant + fail-open, wired into ConnectionCoordinator health path; CommandInfo.hints restored as tolerant JsonElement? — 15 new tests. Session tab min/max width uses BoxWithConstraints with sound overflow threshold and a shared SessionTab composable; empty-list guard and scroll-centre decoupling preserved in both modes. Constructor-param additions (MainViewModel, ConnectionCoordinator) are mechanical with all test fixtures updated. No behaviour removed or silently changed. ChatScreen draft-guard fix is a genuine bugfix.
